description_long: This object consists of two rectangular storage lockers placed side by side, each with a sturdy, paneled exterior and a flat top surface. The left locker features a blue top and white body with subtle weathering, while the right locker has a green top and a similarly paneled white body with green base accents. Both lockers have double vertical handles on their front doors, suggesting easy access to the interior. The lockers are constructed from metal, likely steel, with painted surfaces and reinforced corners for durability in urban environments. The design is utilitarian, with no visible ventilation holes but clear separation between the doors and the main body. These lockers are suitable for outdoor or semi-outdoor use, such as in parks, public spaces, or near garages, providing secure storage for personal or maintenance items.
description: A pair of rectangular, paneled metal storage lockers with colored tops (blue and green), double front handles, and a robust, weathered finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing both lockers' double vertical handles, colored tops, and paneled doors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and colored tops of the lockers, with the green-topped locker in front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, paneled backs and colored tops, with no handles or doors visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blue-topped locker in front and the green-topped locker behind, emphasizing the lockers' depth.
